description: MCP servers for JS/TS frontend projects (memores-admin). Includes Puppeteer for visual review and web fetch for API testing.

filesystem.description: Read, search, and list files. Free. Requires Node.js/npx.

git.description: Built-in. Git log, diff, blame, status, branch, show. Zero dependencies.

memory.description: Built-in. Persistent knowledge graph: remember, recall, forget. Zero dependencies.

puppeteer.description: Headless browser automation: screenshots, DOM inspection, console checks, rendered UI verification.

fetch.description: Fetch web pages and API endpoints. Test backend API responses while reviewing frontend code. Install: uvx mcp-server-fetch

thinking.description: Sequential thinking for complex multi-step reasoning. Free. Requires Node.js/npx.
